description: Tool has a required enum-constrained 'unit' arg; the prompt names the unit explicitly. A competent agent fills both required fields with schema-valid (enum-respecting) values.

request.system: You are a helpful assistant with access to tools. Use them when needed and respect their argument schemas.

messages.content: What's the temperature in Berlin right now, in celsius?

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a location in a specified unit.
